title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAMPALOC AVENUE IN QUEZON CITY TO DON TOMAS MORATO AVENUE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 411 / 65 OG No. 2, 249 (January 13, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4749, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAMPALOC AVENUE IN QUEZON CITY TO DON TOMAS MORATO AVENUE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Sampaloc Avenue in Quezon City is hereby changed to Don Tomas Morato Avenue, the provision of any law, ordinance, resolution or executive order to the contrary notwithstanding.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
